action_metadata.metadata_title: Global Order Book connect Cardano DeFi to increase transaction

onchain_context:
onchain DRep vote counts so far: yes=15 no=16 abstain=3 (explicit ballots, not stake-weighted)
treasury flow (36 epochs): inflow 158838297854652 lovelace, enacted withdrawals 361435336000000 lovelace, ratio 2.275492

fact_verdicts.fact: Action id is c0660dfd01b0a2d9ba7bac02014370096242ec756031b57d78080844fbbe9c05#0; action type is TreasuryWithdrawals; title is "Global Order Book connect Cardano DeFi to increase transaction"; proposed epoch is 640 and expires after epoch 647. Evidence: onchain: action header; anchor: title.
fact_verdicts.note: Matches the on-chain action metadata and anchor title.

fact_verdicts.fact: The on-chain context reports DRep vote counts so far of yes=15, no=16, abstain=3, described as explicit ballots and not stake-weighted. Evidence: onchain: DRep vote counts.
fact_verdicts.note: Matches Source Material 1 exactly.

fact_verdicts.fact: The on-chain context reports 36-epoch treasury inflow of 158838297854652 lovelace, enacted withdrawals of 361435336000000 lovelace, and ratio 2.275492. Evidence: onchain: treasury flow.
fact_verdicts.note: Matches Source Material 1 exactly.

fact_verdicts.fact: The anchor requests 3,333,000 ADA total, consisting of 3,300,000 ADA for delivery and 33,000 ADA for the 1% budget administration fee. Evidence: anchor: abstract; anchor: Work Package and Budget Summary.
fact_verdicts.note: Stated in both the abstract and rationale budget summary.

fact_verdicts.fact: The anchor names Dano Finance as the delivery party and Minswap Labs as budget administrator. Evidence: anchor: abstract; anchor: Accountability and Risk Controls.
fact_verdicts.note: The anchor says Dano Finance will deliver/support the work and Minswap Labs will serve as budget administrator.

fact_verdicts.fact: The proposal says Dano Finance will accelerate the DeFi Kernel as an open standard for shared liquidity, on-chain financial intents, and global order-book coordination on Cardano. Evidence: anchor: abstract.
fact_verdicts.note: Stated in the abstract.

fact_verdicts.fact: The proposal lists four practical outputs: a public DeFi Kernel registry, a Spot Leverage Order Book, an American Options Market-Making protocol, and a Composable DeFi Transaction Builder SDK. Evidence: anchor: rationale.
fact_verdicts.note: The rationale lists these four outputs.

fact_verdicts.fact: The budget table allocates 300,000 ADA to WP1 DeFi Kernel Registry Website and Submission Process, 1,000,000 ADA to WP2 Spot Leverage Order Book, 1,000,000 ADA to WP3 American Options Protocol, and 1,000,000 ADA to WP4 Composable DeFi Transaction Builder SDK. Evidence: anchor: Work Package and Budget Summary.
fact_verdicts.note: Matches the work package budget table.

fact_verdicts.fact: WP1 milestones include registry website/submission flow and registry operations/onboarding/reporting. Evidence: anchor: Milestone-Based Delivery, WP1.
fact_verdicts.note: Matches WP1 milestone headings.

fact_verdicts.fact: WP2 milestones include protocol design and testnet, security review and mainnet release, and adoption/reporting/integration. Evidence: anchor: Milestone-Based Delivery, WP2.
fact_verdicts.note: Matches WP2 milestone headings.

fact_verdicts.fact: WP3 milestones include protocol design and testnet, security review and mainnet release, and adoption/reporting/integration. Evidence: anchor: Milestone-Based Delivery, WP3.
fact_verdicts.note: Matches WP3 milestone headings.

fact_verdicts.fact: WP4 milestones include SDK architecture and alpha release, SDK v1/protocol adapters/integration examples, and ecosystem integration support/final SDK report. Evidence: anchor: Milestone-Based Delivery, WP4.
fact_verdicts.note: Matches WP4 milestone headings.

fact_verdicts.fact: The DeFi Kernel is described as open, fee-free, and royalty-free; registration will not require payment, licensing fees, certification fees, listing fees, revenue share, or smart-contract open-sourcing. Evidence: anchor: WP1.
fact_verdicts.note: Stated in the WP1 section.

fact_verdicts.fact: The anchor claims Dano Finance currently has approximately USD 18M in TVL and more than 10,000 on-chain transactions. Evidence: anchor: Why are we the best suited?
fact_verdicts.note: Stated in the suitability section.

fact_verdicts.fact: The Spot Leverage Order Book KPI includes at least USD 1,000,000 in rolling 30-day trading volume within 90 days of mainnet launch, measured using public on-chain data. Evidence: anchor: KPI Framework.
fact_verdicts.note: Matches the Spot Leverage Order Book KPI.

fact_verdicts.fact: The American Options Protocol KPI includes at least USD 1,000,000 in rolling 30-day option notional volume within 90 days of mainnet launch, measured using public on-chain data. Evidence: anchor: KPI Framework.
fact_verdicts.note: Matches the American Options Protocol KPI.

fact_verdicts.fact: Stretch KPIs include Order Book trading reaching USD 3,000,000 to USD 5,000,000 in rolling 30-day trading volume within 180 days of mainnet launch and American Options reaching USD 3,000,000 to USD 5,000,000 in rolling 30-day option notional volume within 180 days of mainnet launch. Evidence: anchor: KPI Framework.
fact_verdicts.note: Matches the stretch KPI bullets.

fact_verdicts.fact: The proposal says smart contract workstreams include security review or audit before mainnet release and critical unresolved security issues block affected mainnet milestones. Evidence: anchor: Accountability and Risk Controls.
fact_verdicts.note: Stated in the accountability and risk controls section.

fact_verdicts.fact: The proposal says public reports will show progress, deployment status, registry status, KPI status, and remaining risks. Evidence: anchor: Accountability and Risk Controls.
fact_verdicts.note: Stated in the accountability and risk controls section.

fact_verdicts.fact: The proposal says unused or unearned funds and unused portions of cancelled, undeliverable, or critically security-blocked milestones will remain unspent or be returned to the Cardano Treasury according to the administrator's process. Evidence: anchor: Under what circumstances would a repayment occur?
fact_verdicts.note: The repayment section states unused or unearned funds are unspent or returned to the Cardano Treasury, and cancelled/blocked milestone unused portions remain unspent or are returned according to the administrator's process.

fact_verdicts.fact: The proposal says Dano Finance will return 5% of protocol fees generated by the Treasury-funded Spot Leverage Order Book and American Options market-making pool contracts for 12 months after mainnet launch, calculated after direct transaction costs, refunds, or protocol-level settlement costs, and reported publicly. Evidence: anchor: Under what circumstances would a repayment occur?
fact_verdicts.note: Stated in the repayment section.

fact_verdicts.fact: The supplied doctrine prioritizes treasury stewardship and downside protection above evidence quality/reproducibility and public-benefit ecosystem growth. Evidence: doctrine: values_hierarchy.md.
fact_verdicts.note: The hierarchy ranks treasury stewardship second, evidence quality third, and public-benefit ecosystem growth fourth.

fact_verdicts.fact: The supplied doctrine states that if ecosystem growth conflicts with treasury stewardship and evidence is weak, prefer ABSTAIN. Evidence: doctrine: values_hierarchy.md.
fact_verdicts.note: Stated in the conflict handling defaults.

fact_verdicts.fact: The supplied doctrine says TreasuryWithdrawals without a complete dossier are scored directionally with an explicit -0.10 caution penalty under the soft gate, and thin or unverifiable asks resolve in practice to NO or ABSTAIN. Evidence: doctrine: treasury_spending_doctrine.md.
fact_verdicts.note: Stated in the soft gate section.

fact_verdicts.fact: The supplied doctrine rejects first-come-first-served budget models and adopts a rolling-window Net Change Limit framework. Evidence: doctrine: treasury_spending_doctrine.md.
fact_verdicts.note: Stated in the core position.

verification.summary: All 25 dossier facts are supported by the supplied source material. No contradicted facts or invented material specifics were found.
